content.fact_text: Messaging Infrastructure Module providing fault-tolerant, secure, and verifiable event-driven communication.

provenance_data.behaviour: Initializes a robust Kafka messaging service with circuit breaking for producers, cryptographic HMAC signing for message integrity, and automated DLQ routing for failed message consumption.
interfaces: publish(topic: string, key: string, message: any): Promise<void>
createConsumer(groupId: string, topic: string, handler: (payload: any) => Promise<void>): Promise<void>
provenance_data.utility: Provides production-grade message bus infrastructure for the inventory reconciliation service, ensuring reliability and data integrity.
